markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration and share marketing insights between GrowthX and Madrona Venture Group.](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Caleb Bushner, now at Madrona Venture Group, offers valuable marketing expertise and is open to collaboration with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Discussion on effective strategies for executive thought leadership and content distribution, emphasizing the importance of consistent, high-quality posting](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential workshop opportunity identified, focusing on AI-led founder branding and updated marketing playbooks](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Insights shared on tools like Brandwatch for social listening and the concept of "par-baked POVs" for efficient content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Marketing Strategy and Content Creation

  - [Importance of balancing personal brand building with company-relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Recommendation to shift Marcel's content ratio: more industry insights, less building-in-public](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Strategy for efficient content creation: pre-approved "par-baked POVs" and repurposing existing materials](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Emphasis on consistent posting (e.g., 3 posts/week) with pre-planned content pillars and themes](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)

### Tools and Techniques for Social Listening

  - [Brandwatch recommended as a robust tool for social listening and measurement](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Creation of a "Petri dish" of \~1000 relevant Twitter accounts to monitor industry trends](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Importance of focusing on a specific, relevant subset of internet conversations rather than broad monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)

### AI Integration in Marketing

  - [Potential for updating existing marketing playbooks with AI perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
  - [Idea for a workshop on "AI-led founder brand" or "AI-led executive brand"](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=2212.0)
  - [Mention of an AI agent concept for tactical execution (details to be discussed in future)](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=2343.0)

### Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Caleb open to conducting a workshop or collaborative content creation with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
  - [Potential topics: founder branding, executive thought leadership, updated marketing playbooks with AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=2212.0)
  - [Suggestion to create a shared Slack channel for ongoing ideation and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=2450.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to drive the direction for potential workshop/collaboration based on GrowthX's needs](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=2421.0)
  - [Set up a follow-up call to discuss specific collaboration opportunities (likely in late October or November)](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)
  - [Jason to unlock Caleb's full access to the GrowthX community platform](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=2484.0)
  - [Potential creation of a shared Slack channel for ongoing discussion and ideation](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=2450.0)
  - [Caleb to revisit collaboration after Madrona's upcoming AI summit (Sept 30-Oct 1) and the birth of his second child](https://fathom.video/share/Ljta4J4Kzr11AbFzL-z8Ybt9oo4oNkgV?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)
